title: thuja plicata f. fastigiata
intro: Thuja plicata f. fastigiata, also known as the fastigiate arborvitae, is a variant of the Western red cedar (Thuja plicata), a coniferous evergreen tree native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. The medicinal properties of Thuja plicata f. fastigiata include its antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Thuja plicata f. fastigiata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
